name: Prune Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Stir in the corn meal thoroughly with the flour mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the eggs, melted shortening, chopped prunes, and milk; mix well.
4. Add this to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
5. Pour into a greased 8x8 inch pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for about 30 minutes.
